sections.paragraph:
Original: צבעון

Transliteration: tsib‛ôn

Phonetic: tsib-one'

BDB Definition:

Zibeon = "coloured"
  1. father of Anah, whose daughter Aholibamah married Esau
  2. son of Seir the Horite
    1. maybe same as 1

Origin: from the same as H6648

TWOT entry: None

Part(s) of speech: Proper Name Masculine
